# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
    }

    parameters {
        text(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'One artifact URL per line. Supports HTTP/HTTPS and S3 presigned URLs.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/releases',
            description: 'Remote deployment directory on production servers.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: 'prod-app-01\nprod-app-02',
            description: 'One production server per line.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REMOTE_USER',
            defaultValue: 'deploy',
            description: 'SSH user for production servers.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'prod-ssh-key',
            description: 'Jenkins SSH credentials ID.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTHCHECK_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional URL to verify deployment after completion.'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'CLEAN_WORKSPACE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Clean workspace before downloading artifacts.'
        )
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloads"
        RELEASE_ID = "${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Prepare') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.CLEAN_WORKSPACE) {
                        deleteDir()
                    }

                    sh "mkdir -p '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}'"

                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS
                        .split(/\r?\n/)
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS
                        .split(/\r?\n/)
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    if (!urls) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URLS must contain at least one URL.')
                    }

                    if (!servers) {
                        error('PRODUCTION_SERVERS must contain at least one server.')
                    }

                    def invalidUrls = urls.findAll { !(it ==~ /^https?:\/\/.+/ || it ==~ /^s3:\/\/.+/ || it ==~ /^https?:\/\/.+\?.+/) }
                    if (invalidUrls) {
                        error("Unsupported URL(s): ${invalidUrls.join(', ')}")
                    }

                    writeFile file: 'artifact_urls.txt', text: urls.join('\n') + '\n'
                    writeFile file: 'servers.txt', text: servers.join('\n') + '\n'
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = readFile('artifact_urls.txt')
                        .split(/\r?\n/)
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        def safeName = url.tokenize('/').last()?.split(/\?/)[0] ?: "artifact_${idx + 1}"
                        def outputPath = "${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${safeName}"

                        if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail
                                command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'aws CLI is required for s3:// URLs'; exit 1; }
                                aws s3 cp '${url}' '${outputPath}'
                            """
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail
                                curl --fail --location --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --silent --show-error \
                                     --output '${outputPath}' '${url}'
                            """
                        }
                    }

                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        ls -lah '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = readFile('servers.txt')
                        .split(/\r?\n/)
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${params.REMOTE_USER}@${server}' \
                                    "mkdir -p '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${env.RELEASE_ID}'"
                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}'/* \
                                    '${params.REMOTE_USER}@${server}':'${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${env.RELEASE_ID}/'
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${params.REMOTE_USER}@${server}' \
                                    "ln -sfn '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${env.RELEASE_ID}' '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/current' && ls -lah '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/current'"
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return params.HEALTHCHECK_URL?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    curl --fail --location --retry 5 --retry-delay 5 --silent --show-error '${params.HEALTHCHECK_URL}'
                """
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully. Release: ${env.RELEASE_ID}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed."
        }
        always {
            archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'artifact_urls.txt, servers.txt, downloads/*', fingerprint: true, onlyIfSuccessful: false
        }
    }
}
